# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-04-23 21:57 SGT. Total: 201. API-confirmed: 101.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. AIHubMix — https://aihubmix.com — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine openrouter, latency 384ms, uptime 100.0% over 2 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
2. AnyRouter — https://anyrouter.dev — score 9.7, API verified, region global, engine one-api, latency 1176ms, uptime 100.0% over 2 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, anthropic, openai, qwen
3. PackyAPI (PackyCode) — https://www.packyapi.com — score 9.6, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 190ms, uptime 100.0% over 2 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai
